languages.text: {n}Губы гемункула злобно кривятся.{/n} "Покуда этот образец не признает мое превосходство, принеся извинения и расписавшись в собственной ничтожности, он останется тут. Смеет называть меня "досточтимым коллегой", воображая, что мы на равных! Какая тошнотворная наивность".

{n}Tervantias's lips curl maliciously.{/n} "Until that specimen acknowledges my superiority by offering an apology and admitting his own insignificance, he will remain here. He dares to call me an 'esteemed colleague,' as if imagining we are equals! Such naivety is truly revolting."
languages.original_text: {n}Губы гемункула злобно кривятся.{/n} "Покуда этот образец не признает мое превосходство, принеся извинения и расписавшись в собственной ничтожности, он останется тут. Смеет называть меня "досточтимым коллегой", воображая, что мы на равных! Какая тошнотворная наивность".

traits.locale_text: {n}Tervantias's lips curl maliciously.{/n} "Until this specimen acknowledges my superiority by offering an apology and admitting its own insignificance, it will remain here. It dares to call me an 'esteemed colleague,' imagining we are equals! Such cloying naivety is truly revolting."

{n}Tervantias's lips curl maliciously.{/n} "Until this specimen acknowledges my superiority by offering an apology and admitting its own insignificance, it will remain here. It dares to call me an 'esteemed colleague,' imagining we are equals! Such cloying naivety is truly revolting."

{n}Tervantias's lips curl maliciously.{/n} "Until that specimen acknowledges my superiority by offering an apology and admitting his own insignificance, he will remain here. He dares to call me an 'esteemed colleague,' as if imagining we are equals! Such naivety is truly revolting."

languages.text: {n}Tervantias schürzt boshaft die Lippen.{/n} "Bis das Versuchsstück meine Überlegenheit anerkennt, indem es sich entschuldigt und seine eigene Bedeutungslosigkeit einräumt, bleibt es hier. Es wagt es, mich einen 'geschätzten Kollegen' zu nennen, als wäre es mir ebenbürtig! Eine derartige Naivität ist wirklich empörend."
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias's lips curl maliciously.{/n} "Until that specimen acknowledges my superiority by offering an apology and admitting his own insignificance, he will remain here. He dares to call me an 'esteemed colleague,' as if imagining we are equals! Such naivety is truly revolting."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tervantias schürzt boshaft die Lippen.{/n} "Bis das Versuchsstück meine Überlegenheit anerkennt, indem es sich entschuldigt und seine eigene Bedeutungslosigkeit einräumt, bleibt es hier. Es wagt es, mich einen 'geschätzten Kollegen' zu nennen, als wäre es mir ebenbürtig! Eine derartige Naivität ist wirklich empörend."

languages.text: {n}Les lèvres de Tervantias se tordent en un sourire mesquin.{/n} « Ce spécimen ne partira pas d'ici tant qu'il n'aura pas reconnu ma supériorité, admis sa propre nullité et présenté ses excuses. Il ose me désigner comme étant son "estimé collègue", comme si nous étions égaux ! Sa naïveté est tout bonnement révoltante. »
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias's lips curl maliciously.{/n} "Until that specimen acknowledges my superiority by offering an apology and admitting his own insignificance, he will remain here. He dares to call me an 'esteemed colleague,' as if imagining we are equals! Such naivety is truly revolting."

traits.locale_text: {n}Les lèvres de Tervantias se tordent en un sourire mesquin.{/n} « Ce spécimen ne partira pas d'ici tant qu'il n'aura pas reconnu ma supériorité, admis sa propre nullité et présenté ses excuses. Il ose me désigner comme étant son "estimé collègue", comme si nous étions égaux ! Sa naïveté est tout bonnement révoltante. »

languages.text: {n}Los labios de Tervantias se curvan con maldad.{/n} «Ese espécimen permanecerá aquí hasta que reconozca mi superioridad con una disculpa y una admisión de su propia insignificancia. Osa llamarme "estimado colega", ¡como si se creyera que somos iguales! Esa ingenuidad es vomitiva».
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias's lips curl maliciously.{/n} "Until that specimen acknowledges my superiority by offering an apology and admitting his own insignificance, he will remain here. He dares to call me an 'esteemed colleague,' as if imagining we are equals! Such naivety is truly revolting."

traits.locale_text: {n}Los labios de Tervantias se curvan con maldad.{/n} «Ese espécimen permanecerá aquí hasta que reconozca mi superioridad con una disculpa y una admisión de su propia insignificancia. Osa llamarme "estimado colega", ¡como si se creyera que somos iguales! Esa ingenuidad es vomitiva».

languages.text: {n}Tervantias'ın dudakları kötü niyetle kıvrılıyor.{/n}"O numune, özür dileyene ve kendi önemsizliğinin farkına varıp üstünlüğümü kabul edene kadar burada kalacak. Beni 'değerli meslektaşım' diye çağırmaya cüret ediyor, sanki eşitiz! Böylesi bir saflık gerçekten iğrenç."
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias's lips curl maliciously.{/n} "Until that specimen acknowledges my superiority by offering an apology and admitting his own insignificance, he will remain here. He dares to call me an 'esteemed colleague,' as if imagining we are equals! Such naivety is truly revolting."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tervantias'ın dudakları kötü niyetle kıvrılıyor.{/n}"O numune, özür dileyene ve kendi önemsizliğinin farkına varıp üstünlüğümü kabul edene kadar burada kalacak. Beni 'değerli meslektaşım' diye çağırmaya cüret ediyor, sanki eşitiz! Böylesi bir saflık gerçekten iğrenç."

languages.text: {n}特万提亚斯的嘴角勾起一抹恶意的笑。{/n}“除非那个样本向我道歉，承认我更高明，以及它自己的微不足道，不然它就会一直留在这里。它竟敢叫我‘尊敬的同僚’，好像真觉得我们地位相当了！这种天真让人作呕。”
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias's lips curl maliciously.{/n} "Until that specimen acknowledges my superiority by offering an apology and admitting his own insignificance, he will remain here. He dares to call me an 'esteemed colleague,' as if imagining we are equals! Such naivety is truly revolting."

traits.locale_text: {n}特万提亚斯的嘴角勾起一抹恶意的笑。{/n}“除非那个样本向我道歉，承认我更高明，以及它自己的微不足道，不然它就会一直留在这里。它竟敢叫我‘尊敬的同僚’，好像真觉得我们地位相当了！这种天真让人作呕。”

languages.text: {n}テルヴァントイアの唇は悪意に歪む。{/n}「その標本が私の優位性を認め謝罪し、自分の無力さを認めるまでは、ここに留まる。私を「尊敬する同僚」と呼ぶなど、まるで同格だと想像しているのか！そんな無知は本当に吐き気がする。」
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias's lips curl maliciously.{/n} "Until that specimen acknowledges my superiority by offering an apology and admitting his own insignificance, he will remain here. He dares to call me an 'esteemed colleague,' as if imagining we are equals! Such naivety is truly revolting."

traits.locale_text: {n}テルヴァントイアの唇は悪意に歪む。{/n}「その標本が私の優位性を認め謝罪し、自分の無力さを認めるまでは、ここに留まる。私を「尊敬する同僚」と呼ぶなど、まるで同格だと想像しているのか！そんな無知は本当に吐き気がする。」
